ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was created */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of service request (e.g., Potholes, Illegal Dumping) */,
  "request_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the request submission (e.g., Control Panel, Website) */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the request (1 for open, 0 for closed) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for handling the request */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the request originated */,
  "council_district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the council district related to the request */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward associated with the request */,
  "tract" REAL /* Census tract for the request location */,
  "public_works_division" INTEGER /* Division of Public Works responsible for the request */,
  "pli_division" INTEGER /* Division of Permits, Licenses, Inspections involved */,
  "police_zone" INTEGER /* Police zone for the request location */,
  "fire_zone" TEXT /* Fire zone for the request location */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the request location */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the request location */,
  "geo_accuracy" TEXT /* Geographic accuracy of the provided coordinates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service request */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the request (1-5, where 1 is highest) */,
  "requester_name" TEXT /* Name of the resident who made the request */,
  "requester_email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident who made the request */,
  "requester_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident who made the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_council_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_district_id") REFERENCES council_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries related to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  " boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial boundaries of the neighborhood (in WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "council_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each council district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the council district */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial boundaries of the council district (in WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the ward */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial boundaries of the ward (in WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated service request */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "geo_accuracy" TEXT /* Geographic accuracy of the provided coordinates */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial boundaries of the location (in WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_data_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated service request */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the request at the time of update */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the request update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated service request */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attached file (e.g., image/jpeg) */,
  "file_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the attached file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_attachments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, resident) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_requests" (
  "user_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated service request */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_requests_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)
